title: [Targeted] AmEx Offer: Get Up To $2,400 Back on U.S. Electronic Goods and Software Purchases
content:
The Offer
Check your AmEx Offers for one of the following deals, valid through 8/31/26:
Spend $4,000 or more on U.S. Electronic Goods and Software Purchases and earn $100 back. Can be done up to 3 times (total of $300).
Spend $16,000 or more on U.S. Electronic Goods and Software Purchases and earn $400 back. Can be done up to 3 times (total of $1,200).
Spend $35,000 or more on U.S. Electronic Goods and Software Purchases and earn $800 back. Can be done up to 3 times (total of $2,400).
model_reasoning: 2% back / $2400 on required spend isn't worth pursuing (need >=50% AND >=$25). This is a targeted AmEx offer that provides up to $2,400 back on eligible electronic goods and software purchases across multiple spending tiers.

title: AT&T Wireless: Switch & Get 25,000 American Airline Miles (60 Days Service Required)
content:
The Offer
Direct link to offer
American Airlines is offering 15,000 miles when you switch to AT&T wireless
model_reasoning: Direct return ~$150 meets the $25 threshold. This is a promotional offer from American Airlines to receive 15,000 miles for switching to AT&T wireless service, which has a cash-equivalent value of approximately $150.
human_reasoning: The est $150 in profit does not compensate for the cost of switching phone lines, which requires a new contract and activation fees. Must always calculate profit as income minus expenses.

title: [MN, WI, MI, WI, FL, GA] Wings Credit Union $500 Checking Bonus + $50 Referral
content:
The Offer
Direct link to offer
Wings Credit Union is offering a bonus of up to $500 when you open a new checking account and complete the following requirements:
Use promo code WINGS26
Enroll in digital banking & eStatements
Complete
15
10 or more net PIN or signature-based debit card or credit card purchases of $5 or more each
Establish recurring qualified payroll direct deposit(s) totaling
Direct deposit $3,000 monthly to get $300.
Direct deposit $4,000 monthly to get $400.
Direct deposit $5,000 monthly to get $500.
model_reasoning: Direct return ~$500 meets the $25 threshold. Wings Credit Union offers a $500 bonus for opening a new checking account, completing debit/credit card purchases, and setting up specific monthly direct deposits in eligible states.
human_reasoning: "Florida: Brevard, Lake, Orange, Osceola, Polk, Seminole, Volusia" this wasn't in the "The Offer" section so I can't be mad, but I'm not in those counties.

title: (Targeted) AmEx Offers: Get $49 Off Walmart+ Annual Membership
content:
The Offer
Check your AmEx Offers for the following deal:
Get a one-time
$40
$49 statement credit by using your enrolled eligible Card to make a single purchase of $98 or more on Walmart+ annual memberships online at Walmart.com/plus by 1/31/2024. See terms.
model_reasoning: 50% back ($49) is substantial cashback. This is a targeted Amex Offer providing a $49 statement credit on a Walmart+ annual membership purchase of $98 or more.
human_reasoning: This is not $49 in profit, this is $49 off.

title: Amazon: Three Months Of Standard Audible For Free
content:
The Offer
Direct link to offer
(our affiliate link)
Amazon is offering three months of standard Audible for free.
Offer valid through July 15, 2026.
model_reasoning: Discount 100% / $0 is below thresholds (need >=50% AND >=$25). Amazon is offering three months of standard Audible for free, which represents a 100% discount on the subscription cost.
human_reasoning: Free and easy, doable from a computer; counts as a moneymaker even if low value.

title: Amazon Sweepstakes: Get $10,000 Amazon Gift Card (200 Winners)
content:
The Offer
Grocery sweepstakes
|
Alexa sweepstakes
(affiliate links)
Grocery Sweepstakes: 100 lucky winners will get a $10,000 Amazon gift card. One free entry per person per day; Prime not required. Offer valid from June 2nd through June 22nd, 2026. There are a few drawings throughout June.
Scroll down and ‘Click to Enroll for Free’
Alexa Sweepstakes: Set up a deal alert with Alexa for a chance to win a $1,000 Amazon gift card. 100 winners will be selected by Prime Day. Offer valid June 2nd through June 18th, 2026. Limit one entry per person.
model_reasoning: Net return ~$0 is below the $25 threshold. The offer is a sweepstakes for Amazon gift cards with no guaranteed payout, thus excluding it from net_profit calculations.
human_reasoning: Free and easy, doable from a computer; counts as a moneymaker even if low value.

title: Varo Money (Online Bank Account) – $100-$150 Sign Up Bonus (iOS & Android)
content:

No direct link to offer, requires a referral. Find a referral
here
.
Varo Money is offering a bonus of $150 when you open a new account and complete the following requirements:
Receive a direct deposit of $500 or more within the first 45 days
model_reasoning: Referral bonus (requires another person); excluded. Varo Money offers a $150 bonus for new accounts via referral when receiving a direct deposit of $500 or more within 45 days.
human_reasoning: This is not a referral bonus, this is using a referral. This is a sign up bonus, which is eligible.

title: [750 Points For Existing Users] Marriott Dining: Earn Up To 6,000 Bonus Points (Eat Around Town)
content:
The Offer
Direct link to offer
Marriott Dining is offering new members a bonus of up to 6,000 points. Bonus is broken down as follows (must be completed within 60 days of account opening):
1,000 bonus points
the first time you spend $30 or more
2,000 bonus points
the second time you spend $30 or more
3,000 bonus points
the third time you spend $30 or more
model_reasoning: Direct return ~$60 meets the $25 threshold. The offer provides 6,000 Marriott Bonvoy points (valued at approximately $60) for completing three dining transactions of $30 or more within 60 days of joining the Eat Around Town program.
human_reasoning: Three dining purchases means this is not free

title: U.S. Eagle Federal Credit Union $90 Referral Bonus
content:
The Offer
Direct link to offer
, don’t share your referrals in the comments below. You can share them
in this linked post
.
U.S. Eagle Federal Credit Union is offering a $90 referral bonus to both parties. To receive the bonus the person signing up must meet
one
of the following requirements:
Any checking account with direct deposit
A share certificate ($1,000 minimum)
A loan or credit card
model_reasoning: Referral bonus (requires another person); excluded. U.S. Eagle Federal Credit Union offers a $90 referral bonus to both the referrer and the new member, provided the new member opens a checking account with direct deposit, a $1,000 share certificate, or a loan/credit card.
human_reasoning: Unsure if there are eligibility requirements, but $90 is $90. Says BOTH PARTIES get the $90, so you can sign up with someone else's referal and get paid.

title: (Update) Credit One Platinum X5 Card Review – 5% Back On Gas, Grocery & More Each Year ($5,000 Cap) – $95 Annual Fee
content:
Update 6/1/26:
Card rebranded as ‘Credit One Bank Platinum X5 Visa Signature Card’. Details are the same and aren’t really interesting. Just bumping this post since you might hear about the card out there with their new media blitz and Shaq partnership.
Original Post 1/16/20:
Credit One offers the Platinum Premier Visa card
, let’s take a look at this card in this mini review.
Contents
[
hide
]
1
Card Basics
2
Our Verdict
Card Basics
Annual fee of $95
Card earns 5% on the first $5,000 each year in the following categories:
Gas
Grocery,
Internet,
Cable,
Satellite TV,
Mobile phone service purchases
Card earns 1% back on all purchase
Our Verdict
Assuming you spend $5,000 in just the 5% categories you’d earn $250, but after the $95 annual fee that brings it down to $155 and brings down the effective earn rate to 3.1%. There are other cards that earn at higher rates on
gas
and
grocery purchases
. Personally I don’t think this card is worth signing up for at all.
model_reasoning: Net return ~$0 is below the $25 threshold. This is a credit card product with an annual fee and cashback structure, not a signup bonus or direct cash profit offer.
human_reasoning: This is an information post about a rebrand, not a new card offering.

title: Wyndham: Earn 7,500-15,000 Points For Staying 2-4 Consecutive Nights
content:
The Offer
Direct link to offer
Wyndham is offering up to 15,000 in bonus points on stays booked by September 3, 2026 and completed by September 30, 2026.
2 Consecutive Nights and earn 7,500 Bonus Points
3 Consecutive Nights and earn 12,500 Bonus Points
4+ Consecutive Nights and earn 15,000 Bonus Points
model_reasoning: Direct return ~$150 meets the $25 threshold. The offer provides up to 15,000 bonus points for consecutive night stays, valued at approximately $150 based on a 1 cent per point valuation.
human_reasoning: $150 is not enough to be worth 4 nights at a Wyndham hotel.
